evidence_index.text: Dr Stubbs failed adequately to inform the complainant of the possible risks and adverse effects of certain proposed surgery
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal finding

evidence_index.text: It dismissed a charge of professional misconduct but found that the proven conduct was conduct unbecoming a medical practitioner
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal finding

evidence_index.text: Obtaining it is at the heart of the practice of medicine. It is a fundamental aspect of proper medical practice
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal reasoning

evidence_index.text: Dr Richard Strawson Stubbs, having been guilty of conduct unbecoming a medical practitioner which conduct reflects adversely on his fitness to practise medicine
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal conclusion

evidence_index.text: The conduct which the Tribunal has found proven in this case occurred in 1993
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal finding

evidence_index.text: a fine of 70% of the available maximum, i.e. $700, should be imposed on Dr Stubbs
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal conclusion

evidence_index.text: Dr Stubbs has already endured considerable publicity (prior to, during and since the hearing)
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal finding

evidence_index.text: the Tribunal considers it unlikely that he will re-offend
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal reasoning

evidence_index.text: pay $24,000 towards the costs and expenses of and incidental to the inquiry
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal conclusion

evidence_index.text: the Tribunal is indebted to counsel for their helpful submissions
evidence_index.speaker: Tribunal reasoning

focused_exam.system: Examination mentioned but findings not specified

timeline_phases.name: Initial Consultation
timeline_phases.description: Patient consults Dr. Stubbs for surgical evaluation

decision_points.prompt: What should be discussed with the patient regarding the surgery?

options.description: Discuss all potential risks, including the possibility of extended hospital stay and further surgery
options.clinical_reasoning: Ensures informed consent by discussing material risks

options.description: Do not discuss potential risks of extended hospital stay and further surgery
options.clinical_reasoning: Failed to provide full information for informed consent

actual_action_defendant.description: Defendant did not inform the patient of the material risks

expected_action_court.description: Full disclosure of risks should have been provided
expected_action_court.standard_of_care_basis: Informed consent is a fundamental aspect of medical practice

explanation.why_defendant_wrong: Failure to inform the patient of material risks prevented informed consent
explanation.what_should_have_happened: Patient should have been informed of all material risks to make an informed decision

malpractice_determination.point_of_failure: Failure to inform patient of material risks
malpractice_determination.counterfactual: Patient would have made an informed decision if risks were disclosed

court_findings.legal_significance: Reflects adversely on fitness to practice
